continuity_rule: Landing creates or resumes one same-shell intake lineage.
Request-type choice keeps the same shell and selected anchor.
Detail capture morphs only the child region and keeps shell chrome intact.
Attachment support remains subordinate inside the same question canvas.
Preference capture remains same-shell and keeps route truth bounded.
Submit is authoritative only in the same shell and only through one dominant action.
Recovery keeps the same shell and rebinds to the same draft lineage.
Urgent guidance replaces the active step in place rather than leaving the shell.
Receipt inherits the same shell anatomy and continuity key.
Status remains one minimal same-shell route instead of a detached dashboard.
